summary: Tested DiscountCalculatorPreview widget in admin panel's Edit Categories Pricing section. All 10 tests passed. Widget compiles without errors, imports correctly, displays in correct location, and all data-testid attributes are present. Calculation logic verified: compound formula for sale+trade badge, guaranteed-sum breakdown math, volume tier pricing. Previous bug fixes (iteration_101) remain intact.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - not related to current feature

issues: Minor React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in AdminDashboard - not related to current feature

critical_code_review_comments: DiscountCalculatorPreview.jsx: Compound badge formula correctly implemented at line 95: Math.round((1-(1-saleDiscountPct/100)*(1-tradeDiscount/100))*100)
DiscountCalculatorPreview.jsx: Guaranteed-sum breakdown correctly implemented at line 89: saleContrib = Math.max(0, totalTradeOff - tradeContrib)
DiscountCalculatorPreview.jsx: Volume tier price correctly calculated at line 121: tradePrice * (1 - disc / 100)
DiscountCalculatorPreview.jsx: WAS/markup bi-directional sync implemented in syncWasFromMarkup() and syncMarkupFromWas() functions
SupplierProducts.js: Widget correctly imported at line 31 and placed at lines 10193-10199 after Sale & Labels section
All required data-testid attributes present: discount-calculator-toggle, discount-calculator-panel, calc-trade-badge, calc-volume-table
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products (1582 products in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DiscountCalculatorPreview widget fully functional. Widget is collapsible (collapsed by default), expands on click, auto-populates from selected product data, shows collection card badge preview, sale ribbon preview (when WAS price set), and volume pricing table. Previous bug fixes from iteration_101 verified intact: TileCollectionsPage.js compound discount formula (line 459), CollectionDetailPage.js guaranteed-sum breakdown (line 1561), hasFinishes logic (line 325).
